title: neottia formosana
intro: Neottia formosana, also known as the Formosa tooth-leaf orchid, is a species of orchid native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Neottia formosana include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its rhizomes and roots can be used to make medicinal preparations, such as extracts and tinctures.
